VAL-REG-005.evidence: grep confirms 'devin' appears exactly once in AgentType (count=1), once as agents key (count=1). '.devin/skills' is unique among skillsDirs (count=1). 'devin/skills' is unique among globalSkillsDirs (count=1). 'Devin for Terminal' is unique displayName (count=1). bun scripts/validate-agents.ts passes (exit 0, 'All agents valid.'). Unit tests also verify uniqueness of key, displayName, skillsDir, globalSkillsDir.

VAL-REG-002.evidence: grep confirms: name='devin', displayName='Devin for Terminal', skillsDir='.devin/skills', globalSkillsDir=join(configHome,'devin/skills'), detectInstalled function present. XDG pattern confirmed. 17 unit tests in devin-agent.test.ts all pass, asserting all field values.

VAL-REG-004.evidence: Unit tests confirm: isUniversalAgent('devin') returns false (skillsDir is '.devin/skills' not '.agents/skills'). 'devin' appears in getNonUniversalAgents() but NOT in getUniversalAgents(). All 3 classification tests pass.

VAL-REG-001.evidence: grep -c "'devin'" src/types.ts returns 1; pnpm type-check shows 6 pre-existing errors only, no new errors. 'devin' exists at line 17 of types.ts in AgentType union.

VAL-REG-006.evidence: bun scripts/validate-agents.ts exits with code 0. Output: 'Validating agents...\nAll agents valid.' Devin agent passes all validation checks.

VAL-REG-003.evidence: Unit tests mock filesystem and verify both branches: 'returns true when ~/.config/devin exists' (mockExistsSync returns true for configHome/devin path) and 'returns false when ~/.config/devin does not exist' (mockExistsSync returns false). Both pass. detectInstalled uses existsSync(join(configHome, 'devin')) where configHome respects XDG_CONFIG_HOME.
